basic_details.job_title: IIM Raipur Software Developer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Raipur (IIM Raipur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Raipur (IIM Raipur) Software Developer Notification 2026 has been released on 29-06-2026 on the official website iimraipur.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIM Raipur Software Developer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Ex-Servicemen/EWS candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: BCA/B.Sc (Computer Science/IT), B. Tech (CS/CE/IT)/BE(CS/CE/IT), MCA, M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT) with minimum first-class marks from a recognised University or Institute
qualification.details: BCA/B.Sc (Computer Science/IT), B. Tech (CS/CE/IT) / BE(CS/CE/IT) or MCA or M.Sc. (Computer Science / IT) with minimum first-class marks from a recognised University or Institute.

salary_details.details: Consolidated emoluments equivalent to the minimum of Pay Level 4 as per the 7th Central Pay Commission, i.e., Basic Pay of Rs. 25,500/- per month plus Dearness Allowance as applicable.

selection_process: Personal Interview Written Test Skill Test
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Raipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Raipur Software Developer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIM Raipur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIM Raipur Software Developer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: BCA/B.Sc (Computer Science/IT), B. Tech (CS/CE/IT) / BE(CS/CE/IT) or MCA or M.Sc. (Computer Science / IT) with minimum first-class marks from a recognised University or Institute.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Ex-Servicemen/EWS candidates.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Consolidated emoluments equivalent to the minimum of Pay Level 4 as per the 7th Central Pay Commission, i.e., Basic Pay of Rs. 25,500/- per month plus Dearness Allowance as applicable.

content_sections.heading: IIM Raipur Software Developer Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Online Applications

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Personal Interview Written Test Skill Test

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Raipur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Raipur Software Developer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Raipur Software Developer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for the IIM Raipur Software Developer position is 19th July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Software Developer post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Software Developer role, candidates must possess a BCA/B.Sc (Computer Science/IT), B. Tech (CS/CE/IT)/BE(CS/CE/IT), MCA, or M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT) with a minimum of first-class marks from a recognized university or institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Software Developer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Software Developer post is 30 years. Age relaxation will be provided to candidates belonging to reserved categories as per the Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Software Developer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Software Developer position will receive consolidated emoluments equivalent to the minimum of Pay Level 4 as per the 7th Central Pay Commission, which is Rs. 25,500/- per month plus applicable Dearness Allowance.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Software Developer post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Software Developer post at IIM Raipur includes a Written Test, Skill Test, and a Personal Interview. Candidates must clear all stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Software Developer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Software Developer in the Indian Institute of Management Raipur recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job for the Software Developer position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIM Raipur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Raipur is located in Raipur, Chhattisgarh, with the pincode 493661.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to visit the official website of IIM Raipur for more details.
